fused_abstractions.name: Path Contract Domain
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: Declarative PATH from path.contract (core → local → project phase) via path_contract_apply; verify via path_contract_verify; contract line syntax maps to lexicon locals (path_token, contract_line, deny_pattern, pending_prepend_dirs).

fused_abstractions.name: Kernel vs Verification Plugin
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: Kernel = portable PATH/migrate/recover (works alone). Plugin = ab/av/at/tmux/cockpit (optional). Plugin calls PublicHooks only; must not change load order or add kernel deps. SN-4 moves plugin files to plugins/verification/ — update Artifact paths, not boundary semantics.
fused_abstractions.expansion_hint: Read PLUGIN.md decision table; ontology nodes shellyxz:Kernel and shellyxz:VerificationPlugin

fused_abstractions.name: Shell Load Order
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: login/profile → env.sh path_contract_apply (core then local, post_vite phase) → environment presets → tool hooks → direnv phase:project → path_contract_reassert at zshrc tail. direnv owns project; contract owns machine.
fused_abstractions.expansion_hint: architecture.md PATH precedence sequence diagram; shell.md load-order reference

fused_abstractions.name: Verification Bridge (ab/av/at)
fused_abstractions.compressed_representation: ab/av/at call agent_* in core/functions.sh → verification_script_path resolves plugins/verification/bin (shim fallback). cockpit-mcp headless parity. Per-repo cockpit.yaml. SHELL_AGENT_STRICT_PATH gates core-only PATH.
